_instructions.limit_hours: Daily screen-time limit in hours. Decimals ok (2.5 = 2h 30m). The warning email fires ONCE per day when this is crossed. The ring in the tray popup shows progress toward this number.
_instructions.idle_detection_enabled: true = minutes with no keyboard/mouse activity are NOT counted. false = any time the screen is on counts (default). Change this in the file to toggle.
_instructions.idle_threshold_minutes: How many consecutive minutes of inactivity = idle. Only matters when idle_detection_enabled is true. Recommended: 5.
_instructions.school_schedule: Default weekly exempt windows. Keys must be lowercase: monday, tuesday, wednesday, thursday, friday, saturday, sunday. Time is 24h format HH:MM. During exempt windows, screen time is NOT counted toward the daily limit. Set a day to an empty list [] for no exemption that day.
_instructions.overrides: Date-specific exceptions — highest priority, overrides school_schedule. Each entry needs a 'label' (your notes), either 'date' (YYYY-MM-DD) OR 'date_range' ({from, to}), and 'exempt' (list of time windows, or [] to remove ALL exemptions for those days). Add a new object to this list for each holiday/break/PD day.
_instructions.report_email: Where the warning and daily report emails are sent. Can be any email address — doesn't have to be the same Gmail used for sending.
_instructions.daily_report_hour: Hour (0-23) when the end-of-day report email is sent. 23 = 11 PM local time on each machine.

school_schedule._note: Remove this _note key when deploying — it's just for your reference.

overrides._example_single_day: Delete this whole block once you understand the format
overrides.label: PD Day — no school
